Also, 'human' content ranks higher on Google. Can you create a video on how you transform AI content to bypass AI detection software. Personally, I find this takes a lot of time, and because you're constantly moving words around the quality also tends to suffer. Thanks.

text: I create grand slam $100M offers and sales copies for different types of businesses on Fiverr using AI. Still, the irony is that local business owners dont understand the value of copy written with AI. And thats right they cant judge if it is a good copy or not. and give bad reviews saying the writer is using AI. Meanwhile, online business owners are totally the opposite.
